zh.lifeSummary: 當William Coxe於1598年出生在英國賀特福爾布洛布恩時，他的父親John Coxe29歲，母親Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow47歲。他於大約1629年與Elizabeth Hutchins結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1656年12月14日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州亨利可瓦林納亨利可 帕里什 邱奇 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Coxe于1598年出生在英国賀特福爾布洛布恩时，他的父亲John Coxe29岁，母亲Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow47岁。他于大约1629年与Elizabeth Hutchins结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1656年12月14日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州亨利可瓦林納亨利可 帕里什 邱奇 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Coxe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Cox
meanings: English: variant of Cocke and Cook , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Ulster): mistranslation of Mac Con Coille (‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’), as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.
Dutch and Flemish: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Cock, a vernacular short form of Cornelius .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Coxe was born in 1598, in Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, England, his father, John Coxe, was 29 and his mother, Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow, was 47. He married Elizabeth Hutchins about 1629. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. He died before 14 December 1656, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, and was buried in Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginia, United States.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Hutchins environ 1629. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé avant 14 décembre 1656, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginie, États-Unis.

ko.lifeSummary: William Coxe(이)가 1598년 영국 허트퍼드실르 브록스보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Coxe(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow(은)는 47세였다. 그는 대략 1629년 Elizabeth Hutchins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1656년 12월 14일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 헨리코 바리나 헨리코 파리시 처르치 세멧리에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hutchins aproximadamente 1629. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 14 de dezembro de 1656, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina,: хенрику пэриш чурч кеметири, варина, хенрику, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Coxe родился в 1598 г. в местности броксбурн, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Coxe было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hutchins около 1629 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер перед 14 декабрь 1656 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности хенрику пэриш чурч кеметири, варина, хенрику, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Coxe nació en 1598, en Broxbourne, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Coxe, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hutchins aproximadamente 1629. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió antes de 14 de diciembre de 1656, en Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginia, Estados Unidos.
